hotel_name: Nhà nghỉ Kiên Quốc (Kien Quoc Guesthouse Long Xuyen)

reviews.title: Too Dirty
reviews.text: Do not reuse old customers' mattresses, sheets, and pillows. The bathroom is not cleaned properly. Old customers leave without cleaning and new customers check in immediately. Everything in the room is left as it was by the previous customer, only the blankets and pillows are arranged. It's too dirty. There is something white on the mattress. The waiting lounge is messy like a pile of trash. After we checked the room, we had to leave immediately after paying; the owner didn’t ask anything. Poor attitude, so avoid it.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
The owner is extremely bad.  
I requested hot water and was charged for it, the room doesn't have a toothbrush, no toilet paper, and no mat in front of the bathroom.

reviews.title: Very bad.
reviews.text: Before booking, remember to read the reviews, everyone. This place is not reliable. I booked a room more than a month in advance, and close to the date, they emailed me to say there were no rooms available. When I was running a marathon, how could I find a room nearby in time? I messaged them on Agoda and they didn't even bother to reply. If a business lacks credibility, it won’t last long.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: NN indicates the time on the AGODA app, so it should be removed from the app to avoid losing customers.

reviews.title: Dirty
reviews.text: Nothing is acceptable, a dirty towel cannot be accepted.

reviews.title: Mosquitoes and sewer smell too much.
reviews.text: The ventilation is poor, so it smells like sewage and there are too many mosquitoes. I could only stay for 2 hours and had to leave early. A terrible experience!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The service is not good, for 2 people they provided 1 large towel and 1 small towel. The staff is not okay.

reviews.title: The price is really cheap.
reviews.text: The cheapest room offers a windowless room with blocked sides, of course, it's that cheap. There is no hairdryer in the room.

reviews.title: Alright
reviews.text:
Advantages:
- Quiet due to being located in an alley
- Air conditioning, hot and cold water is fine
Disadvantages:
- Staff are not very friendly
- Small room
- Basic furnishings
Conclusion: Acceptable for a 1-2 night stay considering the price (218k/night).

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Clean hotel  
Friendly owners  
Sturdy bed, great for jumping  
Good location near restaurants

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
C’est le plus mauvais et plus sale
Le personnel ne m’a pas aidé de porter ma valise
Il n’y a même pas les serviettes 
C’est catastrophique

reviews.title: un bref séjour de 48 h
reviews.text: Qualité ménage j’ai mis 1* , tiroirs non vidé , poussière non effectué sous les meubles , ventilateur poussiéreux , à voir la clim. Concernant la sdb l’équipement n’est vérifié et remplacé pas de fenêtre à cette chambre 104 ça me gêne pas , pas de bruits par contre le matin les portes ne s’ouvre pas tout seul , en cas d’incendie ça craint

reviews.title: Tussenstop
reviews.text:
De kamer was klein maar proper. Het balkon is niet groot en de airconditioning units nemen het grootste deel van deze ruimte in.

Genoeg natuurlijk licht in de kamer.

reviews.title: Cũng được
reviews.text: Đây là nhà xây dạng phòng cho thuê nên cũng được, yên tĩnh, hơi nhỏ
